We have not started the migration yet.
The team completed two milestones in June.
Diogo, could you give us your update? Where are we?
Overall, we are on track. So far, we have finished the design and the first tests.
Good. And the migration? I thought that was this week.
We have not started it yet. We have one blocker: the license approval.
How serious is that? Is the June milestone at risk?
Yes, it is. If the approval arrives on Monday, we are fine. If not, we are behind schedule by three days.
What do you need from me?
A decision on the license by Friday. Then I can confirm the June date.
You have it. Send me one line by email so I do not forget.
Overall, we are on track.
We are a little behind on testing.
We have one blocker: the license approval.
I need a decision on the license by Friday.

Hi Diogo, this is Sophia. Tomorrow you give the status update to the leadership team. Please keep it short. Start with the overall status: are we on track, or behind schedule? Then tell us what is done so far, and what is blocked. If a milestone is at risk, say it early, not at the end. And finish with the next step and a date. Two minutes is enough. Thank you, and see you tomorrow.

Good morning. Here is the status of Project Atlas. Overall, we are on track. So far, we have finished the design and the first round of tests. The team has completed two milestones this month. We have not started the migration yet, because we have one blocker: the license approval is still pending. For that reason, the June milestone is at risk. My next step is simple. I need a decision on the license by Friday. If I have it, we keep the June date. That is all from me. Questions are welcome.

Sophia asks Diogo for the status of Project Atlas. Diogo says the project is on track overall. He explains that the migration has not started, because of one blocker. Sophia asks what he needs from her. Diogo asks for a decision on the license by Friday.
